name: Countdown CTA
description: Urgency CTA with a live ticking countdown to a fixed deadline — for launches, sale endings, and registration cutoffs. Includes neutral, muted, and inverse tone variants and a graceful post-deadline state.

descriptions.descriptive: Centered headline-and-CTA block anchored by a four-block live countdown (days, hours, minutes, seconds) ticking every second to a configured ISO timestamp. Three tone variants: neutral on bg-base-100, muted on bg-base-200, and a high-impact inverse on bg-base-content. After the deadline, the timer collapses to a calm fallback message instead of negative values.
descriptions.usage: Drop into pages tied to a real deadline — product launch, conference registration cutoff, limited-edition sale, application window. Place near the bottom of a launch page or inline above a pricing block. Pair with footer-pulse or footer-reveal at page close.
descriptions.audienceFit: Product launches, event sites, e-commerce drops, and any segment where genuine scarcity (not manufactured urgency) is the lever. Inverse tone matches editorial-bold briefs; neutral and muted suit corporate and minimal.
